stages.title: Deploy generated workloads
successCriteria: Scheduled jobs validated in dry-run mode
stages.rollbackTrigger: Repeated startup failures or missing dependencies

stages.title: Shift 5% traffic to green
stages.rollbackTrigger: Error budget breach or dependency failures

stages.title: Shift 25% traffic to green
stages.rollbackTrigger: SLO breach, DB error spikes, or operator abort

stages.title: Shift 50% traffic to green
stages.rollbackTrigger: Sustained queue backlog growth or health probe failures

stages.title: Shift 100% traffic to green
stages.rollbackTrigger: Critical alert, severe performance regression, or policy breach

stages.title: Stabilization and rollback hold window
successCriteria: No critical alerts for full hold window
stages.rollbackTrigger: SLO regression or unresolved high-priority incident

rollbackSimulations.name: Health Check Failure
rollbackSimulations.trigger: Readiness probes fail for two consecutive windows
rollbackSimulations.expectedAction: Route traffic back to blue immediately and freeze green updates.

rollbackSimulations.name: SLO Breach
rollbackSimulations.trigger: Latency/error SLO breach at 25%+ traffic stage
rollbackSimulations.expectedAction: Rollback to previous stable stage and open incident workflow.

rollbackSimulations.name: Data Path Regression
rollbackSimulations.expectedAction: Abort cutover, restore blue path, and preserve diagnostics.

notes: Human sign-off is required before and after cutover execution.
